project_info.name: QuantChat
project_info.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) influences
project_info.vibe: Snapchat-style modern dark, premium minimal clean, stealthy, fluid

rules: No generic full-screen gradients. Rely on matte black backgrounds.
Use 1px borders with very low opacity (e.g., border-white/10) to define sections instead of heavy cards.
The AI accent (purple/neon) must only be used as a glow, drop-shadow, or gradient-text, never as a flat block background.

headings.usage: H1/H2 for primary screen titles (Chats, Spotlight, AI Assistant).

body.usage: Chat bubbles, names, timestamps, settings labels.

layout_and_spacing.general: Mobile-first approach. For desktop viewports, wrap the main app container in `max-w-md mx-auto h-screen relative overflow-hidden bg-black shadow-2xl md:border md:border-white/10` to simulate a phone screen.
layout_and_spacing.containers: Generous padding inside settings/modals (p-6). Chat/Feed lists use tighter vertical spacing (py-3) but retain side padding (px-4).

surfaces.classes: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-white/10 pb-safe pt-3 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50
bg-white text-black rounded-2xl rounded-br-sm px-4 py-2.5 max-w-[80%] shadow-sm
bg-[#1A1A24] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-4 py-2.5 max-w-[80%] border border-white/5 shadow-sm
bg-[#0A0A0F]/90 backdrop-blur-3xl border border-white/10 rounded-t-3xl shadow-[0_-8px_32px_rgba(157,76,221,0.15)] p-6

interactions_and_motion.buttons: Use Framer Motion `whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }}` for tactile response.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Slide up for modals/stories (`y: '100%' -> y: 0`), cross-fade for bottom tab switches.
interactions_and_motion.ai_orb: Continuous slow pulse using Framer Motion (`scale: [1, 1.05, 1], boxShadow: '0px 0px 20px rgba(157,76,221,0.5)'`).

components.auth: One-click 'Login as Demo User' primary button. Minimalist, centered logo. High-contrast white button on black background, full width rounded-full.
components.inbox_list: Left: 48px circular Avatar. Center: Name (`font-medium`) + Message Preview (`text-secondary truncate`). Right: Time (`text-xs text-muted`) + Unread Dot (`w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-brand`).
components.stories_feed: Horizontal scroll (`overflow-x-auto snap-x hide-scrollbar`). 72px circular avatars with 2px gradient borders (brand to transparent) for unread stories. Inner border to separate image from gradient.
components.reels_spotlight: Full height (`h-[100dvh]`). `snap-y snap-mandatory`. Absolute positioned text overlays on video/image with `drop-shadow-md` for text legibility. Action buttons stacked vertically on the right.
components.settings_profile: Sectioned lists with `border-b border-white/5` between items. Use `lucide-react` icons on the left, `chevron-right` on the right. High contrast toggle switches.
components.ai_assistant: Floating Action Button (FAB) or dedicated center nav tab. Opens a conversational sheet. AI text should appear with a slight typewriter reveal effect.

icons.style: Use `strokeWidth={1.5}` for a sharper, premium look. Default to size 24.

media.rules: Never use placeholder URLs (like via.placeholder.com). Use the provided Unsplash image URLs below.

assets.description: User profile pictures for chat lists and story rings
Dark textures for AI backgrounds, Spotlight/Reel placeholders, or login screen

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid`. Examples: `data-testid='login-demo-btn'`, `data-testid='nav-chat'`, `data-testid='chat-item-0'`, `data-testid='ai-fab-btn'`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this file fully. Use .js/.jsx syntax only (NO TypeScript).
Build a mobile-first app structure. Use `max-w-md mx-auto relative h-[100dvh] bg-black overflow-hidden` for the root app container to ensure it looks like a phone on desktop monitors.
Implement Shadcn UI components but heavily customize the classes to match the 'surfaces' configuration. Strip away default white borders and light mode backgrounds.
Ensure bottom tab navigation has a glassmorphic effect (`backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/70`).
Integrate the AI agent workflow (mocked if no backend) utilizing the 'ai_assistant' layout guidelines.
For AWS EC2 deployment guidance, write a markdown file `deployment-guide.md` with instructions on hosting a mobile web app via Nginx/Node.
